title: Hiring Software Engineer at HealthifyMe Consulting Pvt Ltd

jsonLd.title: Hiring Software Engineer at HealthifyMe Consulting Pvt Ltd
jsonLd.description:
Join the HealthifyMe Consulting Pvt Ltd family as a Software Engineer in Amritsar. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About HealthifyMe Consulting Pvt Ltd:
HealthifyMe Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Go

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Amritsar, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with HealthifyMe Consulting Pvt Ltd!
